title: argemone squarrosa var. glabrata
intro: Argemone squarrosa var. glabrata, also known as the smooth prickly poppy, is a plant species belonging to the Papaveraceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and analgesic effects. The smooth prickly poppy is valued for its health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and providing relief from pain. Herbal preparations of Argemone squarrosa var. glabrata include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to create remedies for various ailments.
